__SYSTEM__: AeroForgeX v4.0 Pro :: Master Configuration & Multidisciplinary Optimization Matrix
__AUTHOR__: Gamil Abdullah Al-Sharif & Yhya Abdullah Al-Wazir|Mechanical Engineering, Sanaa, Yemen
__DESCRIPTION__: Comprehensive aerodynamic, topological, and kinematic optimization template.

opt_opts.__DOC_AERO_SOLVER__: Selects the aerodynamic evaluator. 'neuralfoil' (Deep Learning Surrogate) or 'xfoil' (Fortran Subprocess).
opt_opts.__DOC_SHAPE_FUNCTIONS__: Selects the mathematical parameterization engine. Options: 'cst' (Kulfan), 'bezier', 'hicks-henne', 'camb-thick'.
opt_opts.__DOC_AIRFOIL_FILE__: Path to the starting seed geometry (.dat, .bez, or .hicks).
opt_opts.__DOC_OUTPUT_DIR__: Target directory for logs, CSV matrices, and optimal geometries.
opt_opts.__DOC_OUTPUT_PREFIX__: The base filename applied to all generated files.
opt_opts.__DOC_CPU_THREADS__: Number of CPU cores to allocate. Use -1 to automatically utilize all available physical cores.
opt_opts.__DOC_CONSOLE__: Controls terminal UI. 'verbose' prints live matrices. 'wait' pauses terminal upon completion.

__DOC_GEOM_NOTE__: Only the block corresponding to your chosen 'shape_func' will be evaluated. The others are ignored.

cst_opts.__DOC_CST__: Kulfan Class Shape Transformation (CST). Highly robust analytical method guaranteeing smooth derivatives.

bez_opts.__DOC_BEZIER__: Parametric Bezier Curves. Prevents numerical stalls by eliminating high-frequency surface noise.

hh_opts.__DOC_HH__: Sine-bump mathematical perturbations applied additively over the baseline seed geometry.

ct_opts.__DOC_CAMB_THICK__: Global scalar morphing operations. Optimizes max limits without altering the underlying shape distribution.

op_conds.__DOC_NUM_PTS__: Defines the total number of flight conditions. MUST match the length of the arrays below.
op_conds.__DOC_DEFAULTS__: Fallback physical states if array values are omitted or missing.
op_conds.__DOC_FLAPS__: Kinematic Trailing Edge deflections. use_flap allows mathematical rotation of the trailing edge.
op_conds.__DOC_DYN_WEIGHTING__: Dynamic Weighting Engine. Automatically inflates multipliers for underperforming objectives to force convergence.
op_conds.__DOC_ARRAYS__: v4.2 Data Arrays. Order represents OP 1 through 25.

geo_tgts.__DOC_TARGETS__: Soft geometric objectives evaluated continuously. Valid types: 'thickness', 'camber', 'match-foil'.

progression_spec.__DOC_PROG__: Gradual Geometry Progression. Slowly shifts targeted values alongside aerodynamic gains to prevent stalling.

constr.__DOC_CONSTRAINTS__: Hard physical boundaries. Any design vector violating these is immediately rejected (Penalty = 1000).

curv.__DOC_CURVATURE__: Strict mathematical limits on surface noise. Prevents chaotic flows and Boundary Layer separation.

panel_opts.__DOC_PANEL__: NASA Arc-Cosine discrete coordinate clustering parameters. Regulates point density before solver ingestion.

xfoil_opts.__DOC_XFOIL__: Backend limits for Fortran Subprocess evaluation. VACCEL > 0.01 mathematically destabilizes Newton root-finding.
xfoil_opts.__DOC_SAP__: Surrogate-Assisted Pre-Screening. Bypasses Fortran if the AI predicts an immediate stall/failure.

optim_set.__DOC_PYMOO__: Global Search and Local Simplex Hyperparameters for the PyMoo AI Engine.
